objects.justification: The hoax hypothesis is rejected by the overwhelming scientific consensus, multiple independent national space agencies, and 55+ years of corroborating physical evidence. Assign very low prior.
objects.label: moon_landing_hoax

objects.justification: The flag rippling is clearly visible in archived footage.
objects.label: obs_flag_waves

objects.justification: No stars are visible in any Apollo surface photographs.
objects.label: obs_no_stars

objects.justification: Apollo trajectories through Van Allen belts are documented fact.
objects.label: obs_radiation_belt

objects.justification: Non-parallel shadows are visible in several Apollo photos.
objects.label: obs_shadows

objects.justification: Sharp bootprints are clearly visible in Apollo surface photos.
objects.label: obs_footprints

objects.justification: No significant blast crater is visible in photos of LM landing sites.
objects.label: obs_no_crater

objects.justification: Studio air currents would cause continuous random fluttering, not the observed pattern of motion only when touched. The observed motion pattern contradicts the studio hypothesis.
objects.label: alt_flag_studio

objects.justification: The absence of stars is fully explained by camera exposure settings. A studio backdrop explanation is unnecessary and provides no additional explanatory power.
objects.label: alt_no_stars_studio

objects.justification: Dosimetry data from onboard monitors measured ~0.18 rad total. The claim of lethal radiation ignores transit time and shielding.
objects.label: alt_radiation_lethal

objects.justification: Multiple light sources would produce multiple shadows per object. No Apollo photo shows multiple shadows. The studio hypothesis is directly contradicted by the photographic evidence.
objects.label: alt_shadows_studio

objects.justification: Returned lunar regolith samples confirm angular particle morphology. The wet sand hypothesis is contradicted by direct sample analysis.
objects.label: alt_footprints_fake

objects.justification: SELENE and Chandrayaan images confirm swept regolith, consistent with vacuum rocket exhaust. A static prop cannot produce this signature.
objects.label: alt_crater_studio

objects.justification: Laser ranging experiments have been conducted continuously since 1969.
objects.label: obs_retroreflector_us

objects.justification: China's Yunnan Observatory (2018) and SYSU TianQin Center (2019) independently verified all five lunar retroreflectors.
objects.label: obs_retroreflector_china

objects.justification: Technically possible to place retroreflectors via unmanned probes (the Soviets did this with Lunokhod). However, this would require an additional conspiracy: secretly launching unmanned missions while publicly claiming manned ones. Low but not negligible prior.
objects.label: alt_retroreflector_unmanned

objects.justification: 381.7 kg of samples analyzed by thousands of scientists over 50+ years.
objects.label: obs_moon_rocks

objects.justification: Isotopic match between Apollo and Soviet Luna samples is published science.
objects.label: obs_soviet_samples_match

objects.justification: Published in Chinese peer-reviewed journals by CAS scientists.
objects.label: obs_china_sample

objects.justification: Would require thousands of geochemists across dozens of countries to be either complicit or incompetent for 50+ years. Nano-structures from micrometeorite impacts cannot be fabricated.
objects.label: alt_rocks_fake

objects.justification: High-resolution LRO imagery is publicly available and verified.
objects.label: obs_lro_images

objects.justification: JAXA (Japan) published SELENE results independently.
objects.label: obs_japan_selene

objects.justification: ISRO (India) published Chandrayaan results independently.
objects.label: obs_india_chandrayaan

objects.justification: Requires a conspiracy spanning US, Japan, and India — three countries with independent space programs and no shared motivation to help NASA.
objects.label: alt_imaging_fake

objects.justification: Soviet deep-space tracking was operational and independently documented.
objects.label: obs_soviet_tracked

objects.justification: The Great Soviet Encyclopedia is a verifiable state publication.
objects.label: obs_soviet_encyclopedia

objects.justification: Luna 15 mission and coordination are documented in both US and Soviet archives.
objects.label: obs_soviet_luna15

objects.justification: The Soviet Union had every geopolitical motivation to expose a fraud. Complicity with their primary Cold War rival is implausible.
objects.label: alt_soviet_complicit

objects.justification: Apollo workforce size is documented in NASA records and contractor data.
objects.label: obs_400k_people

objects.justification: Ouyang Ziyuan's statements are publicly documented. He is China's most authoritative lunar scientist with no allegiance to NASA.
objects.label: obs_ouyang_endorsement

objects.justification: If all six scientific explanations are individually correct, they jointly explain all anomalies with high probability.
Explaining away all anomalies removes the hoax hypothesis's photographic evidence base, but alone doesn't prove the landings — other evidence lines provide that.
Statistical modeling strongly supports conspiracy implausibility.
If large-scale conspiracy is implausible, landings were likely real.
China's independent scientific authority plus independent data strongly supports landing authenticity.

priors.justification: The hoax hypothesis is rejected by the overwhelming scientific consensus, multiple independent national space agencies, and 55+ years of corroborating physical evidence. Assign very low prior.
The flag rippling is clearly visible in archived footage.
No stars are visible in any Apollo surface photographs.
Apollo trajectories through Van Allen belts are documented fact.
Non-parallel shadows are visible in several Apollo photos.
Sharp bootprints are clearly visible in Apollo surface photos.
No significant blast crater is visible in photos of LM landing sites.
Studio air currents would cause continuous random fluttering, not the observed pattern of motion only when touched. The observed motion pattern contradicts the studio hypothesis.
The absence of stars is fully explained by camera exposure settings. A studio backdrop explanation is unnecessary and provides no additional explanatory power.
Dosimetry data from onboard monitors measured ~0.18 rad total. The claim of lethal radiation ignores transit time and shielding.
Multiple light sources would produce multiple shadows per object. No Apollo photo shows multiple shadows. The studio hypothesis is directly contradicted by the photographic evidence.
Returned lunar regolith samples confirm angular particle morphology. The wet sand hypothesis is contradicted by direct sample analysis.
SELENE and Chandrayaan images confirm swept regolith, consistent with vacuum rocket exhaust. A static prop cannot produce this signature.
Laser ranging experiments have been conducted continuously since 1969.
China's Yunnan Observatory (2018) and SYSU TianQin Center (2019) independently verified all five lunar retroreflectors.

Technically possible to place retroreflectors via unmanned probes (the Soviets did this with Lunokhod). However, this would require an additional conspiracy: secretly launching unmanned missions while publicly claiming manned ones. Low but not negligible prior.
381.7 kg of samples analyzed by thousands of scientists over 50+ years.
Isotopic match between Apollo and Soviet Luna samples is published science.
Published in Chinese peer-reviewed journals by CAS scientists.
Would require thousands of geochemists across dozens of countries to be either complicit or incompetent for 50+ years. Nano-structures from micrometeorite impacts cannot be fabricated.
High-resolution LRO imagery is publicly available and verified.
JAXA (Japan) published SELENE results independently.
ISRO (India) published Chandrayaan results independently.
Requires a conspiracy spanning US, Japan, and India — three countries with independent space programs and no shared motivation to help NASA.
Soviet deep-space tracking was operational and independently documented.
The Great Soviet Encyclopedia is a verifiable state publication.
Luna 15 mission and coordination are documented in both US and Soviet archives.
The Soviet Union had every geopolitical motivation to expose a fraud. Complicity with their primary Cold War rival is implausible.
Apollo workforce size is documented in NASA records and contractor data.
Ouyang Ziyuan's statements are publicly documented. He is China's most authoritative lunar scientist with no allegiance to NASA.

strategy_params.justification: If all six scientific explanations are individually correct, they jointly explain all anomalies with high probability.
Explaining away all anomalies removes the hoax hypothesis's photographic evidence base, but alone doesn't prove the landings — other evidence lines provide that.
Statistical modeling strongly supports conspiracy implausibility.
If large-scale conspiracy is implausible, landings were likely real.
China's independent scientific authority plus independent data strongly supports landing authenticity.
